name: The Ponderosa Club
about: The Ponderosa Club (TPC) is an exclusive, membership-based golf simulator venue in Ellensburg, WA, offering year-round play in climate-controlled comfort. It features two simulator bays equipped with high-end technology, including Uneekor EYE X02 launch monitors and GSPRO software, providing access to over 1,500 virtual courses. The club operates on a 24/7 booking system, with capacity for four golfers per bay or up to 12 for private events. Members enjoy personalized lockers, a bespoke atmosphere with custom woodwork and local art, and the ability to bring non-member guests.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Uneekor EYE X02 launch monitors with 25 data points for precise tracking
24/7 access to two simulator bays with personalized 6-digit entry codes
Bespoke atmosphere with high-end furnishings, local art, and a luxury feel

food_and_drink.notes: Outside food is permitted; local restaurant menus and delivery options are available
Outside alcohol is permitted; venue will also be stocked with beer, wine, and non-alcoholic beverages for purchase via an honor system

simulator_hardware.notes: Uses three high-speed cameras and infrared light for precision accuracy

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, members are expected to bring their own golf clubs and equipment, as each member receives a personalized locker for storage.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, outside food and beverages are permitted. Alcohol is also allowed to be brought in, and the venue will have snacks and drinks available for purchase via an honor-based point-of-sale system.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes will depend on your pace and the simulator software, but bookings are made in half-hour increments, so members can book multiple slots as needed.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The Ponderosa Club is an exclusive, adult-focused venue. While it may accommodate older children in a family setting, the primary atmosphere and amenities are geared toward adults and serious golfers.
